# Correlation between limma t and active task percentage

## Hu 2025
```{r}
taskInfo = read.csv2("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/CellFieOut/ESCC/taskInfo.csv", 
                     sep=",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
                     setNames(c("Depth3.ID", "Depth3", "Depth1", "Depth2"))
DEG_files_H = "../results/CellFie_Hu2025/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_H = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_H), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_H, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)

cancers = cfs %>% mutate(Cancer_type=gsub("_.*","",Group)) %>%
    pull(Cancer_type) %>% unique()
sigDiffCor_depth3_H = lapply(cancers, function(c) {
    TaskScore = cfs %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
        left_join(Hu2025_meta) %>% 
        filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
        filter(Cancer_type==c) %>% 
        mutate(Task = Depth3) %>% 
        group_by(Task) %>%
        summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
    temp = degs_H %>% filter(Cancer_type==c) %>% select(Task, t) %>%
        inner_join(TaskScore) %>% unique() %>% na.omit()
    n = nrow(temp)
    temp = cor.test(temp$t, temp$ActiveTaskPerc)
    temp = data.frame(cor=temp$estimate, p.value=temp$p.value)
    temp$Cancer_type = c
    temp$Study="Hu2025"
    temp$SampleSize = n
    temp
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
    mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
    arrange(p.adj) %>%
    mutate(Regulation = ifelse(p.adj<0.05, "Sig", "No"))
sigDiffCor_depth3_H$Cancer_type = factor(sigDiffCor_depth3_H$Cancer_type,
    levels=sigDiffCor_depth3_H$Cancer_type)

dir.create("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation_scoreVSt/", 
    recursive=T, showWarnings=F)
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation_scoreVSt/Cor_ScoreVSt_depth3_Hu2025.pdf", h=3.7, w=5)
ggplot(sigDiffCor_depth3_H, aes(x=Cancer_type, y=cor)) +
    geom_point(aes(size=p.adj, color=cor)) +
    # facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    # scale_shape_manual(values = c("Sig" = 20, "No" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Normal.Task.Score vs t") +
    scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="slateblue1", mid="snow2", high="red", midpoint=0) +
    # scale_color_gradient(values=c("No"="grey", "Sig"="orange")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        # strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) +
    labs(X="Cancer_type", y="Pearson correlation",
         caption=paste0("n = 138, p.adj Method = BH"))
dev.off()

```

## Zhou2020
```{r}
taskInfo = read.csv2("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/CellFieOut/ESCC/taskInfo.csv", 
                     sep=",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
                     setNames(c("Depth3.ID", "Depth3", "Depth1", "Depth2"))
DEG_files_Z = "../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_Z = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_Z), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_Z, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)

cancers = Zhou2020_meta %>% pull(Cancer_type) %>% unique()
sigDiffCor_depth3_Z = lapply(cancers, function(c) {
    TaskScore = cf5 %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
        left_join(Zhou2020_meta) %>% 
        filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
        filter(Cancer_type==c) %>% 
        mutate(Task = Depth3) %>% 
        group_by(Task) %>%
        summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
    temp = degs_Z %>% filter(Cancer_type==c) %>% select(Task, t) %>%
        inner_join(TaskScore) %>% unique() %>% na.omit()
    n = nrow(temp)
    if (n>2) {
        temp = cor.test(temp$t, temp$ActiveTaskPerc)
        temp = data.frame(cor=temp$estimate, p.value=temp$p.value)
        temp$Cancer_type = c
        temp$Study="Zhou2020"
        temp$SampleSize = n
    } else {
        temp = data.frame(cor=NA, p.value=NA)
        temp$Cancer_type = c
        temp$Study="Zhou2020"
        temp$SampleSize = n
    }
    temp
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
    mutate(p.adj = p.adjust(p.value, method="BH")) %>%
    arrange(p.adj) %>%
    mutate(Regulation = ifelse(p.adj<0.05, "Sig", "No"))
sigDiffCor_depth3_Z$Cancer_type = factor(sigDiffCor_depth3_Z$Cancer_type,
    levels=sigDiffCor_depth3_Z$Cancer_type)

dir.create("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation_scoreVSt/", 
    recursive=T, showWarnings=F)
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation_scoreVSt/Cor_ScoreVSt_depth3_Zhou2020.pdf", h=3.85, w=5.5)
ggplot(sigDiffCor_depth3_Z, aes(x=Cancer_type, y=cor)) +
    geom_point(aes(size=p.adj, color=cor)) +
    # facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    # scale_shape_manual(values = c("Sig" = 20, "No" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Normal.Task.Score vs t") +
    scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    scale_color_gradient2(low="slateblue1", mid="snow2", high="red", midpoint=0) +
    # scale_color_gradient(values=c("No"="grey", "Sig"="orange")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        # strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) +
    labs(X="Cancer_type", y="Pearson correlation",
         caption=paste0("n = 176, p.adj Method = BH"))
dev.off()


openxlsx::write.xlsx(list(Others=as.data.frame(sigDiffCor_depth3_H), 
                       Zhou2020=as.data.frame(sigDiffCor_depth3_Z)), 
  file=paste0("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation_scoreVSt/correlation_scoreVSt.xlsx"))

```


# Correlation between the nr of up/downregulated tasks and the Active task percentage in normal tissues for each cancer type.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
# Hu2025 metabolic task score datasets
cfs = readRDS("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/Summary/cfs.RDS")
# Zhou2020 metabolic task score datasets
cf5 = readRDS("../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/Summary/cf5.RDS")
Sample_meta_Zhou2020 = readRDS(
    "../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/data/Zhou2020/meta.RDS")
Sample_meta_Hu2025 = readRDS(
    "../results/CellFie_Hu2025/data/Hu2025/Meta_hu2025.RDS")

taskInfo = read.csv2("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/CellFieOut/ESCC/taskInfo.csv", 
                     sep=",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
                     setNames(c("Depth3.ID", "Depth3", "Depth1", "Depth2"))
DEG_files_H = "../results/CellFie_Hu2025/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_H = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_H), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_H, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)

DEG_files_Z = "../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_Z = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_Z), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_Z, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)


getCor = function(sum_statistic="ActiveTaskPerc") {
    # Zhou 2020 
    temp2 = cf5 %>% left_join(Sample_meta_Zhou2020, by="Sample")
    cancer_types = unique(temp2$Cancer_type)
    sigDiffCor_depth2 = lapply(cancer_types, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = temp2 %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% 
            dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            filter(Condition=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Cancer_type==t) %>%
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Depth2")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
        temp = degs_Z[degs_Z$Cancer_type%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Depth2")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            n = temp[, c("SigDownTaskPerc", sum_statistic)] %>%
                na.omit() %>% nrow()
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value, N_dn=n)
            n = temp[, c("SigUpTaskPerc", sum_statistic)] %>%
                na.omit() %>% nrow()
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value, N_up=n)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$Cancer_type = t
            temp$Study="Zhou2020"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
                cor_dn = numeric(),
                p.value_dn = numeric(),
                cor_up = numeric(),
                p.value_up = numeric(),
                Cancer_type = character(),
                Study = character(),
                N_dn = numeric(),
                N_up = numeric()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="fdr")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="fdr")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)

    # Hu 2025
    temp2 = cfs %>% left_join(Sample_meta_Hu2025%>%mutate(Condition=Group), by="Sample")
    cancer_types = unique(temp2$Cancer_type)
    sigDiffCor_depth2H = lapply(cancer_types, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = temp2 %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% 
            dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            filter(Condition=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Cancer_type==t) %>%
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Depth2")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
        temp = degs_H[degs_H$Cancer_type%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Depth2")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            n = temp[, c("SigDownTaskPerc", sum_statistic)] %>%
                na.omit() %>% nrow()
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value, N_dn=n)
            n = temp[, c("SigUpTaskPerc", sum_statistic)] %>%
                na.omit() %>% nrow()
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value, N_up=n)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$Cancer_type = t
            temp$Study="Others"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
            cor_dn = numeric(),
            p.value_dn = numeric(),
            cor_up = numeric(),
            p.value_up = numeric(),
            Cancer_type = character(),
            Study = character(),
            N_dn = numeric(),
            N_up = numeric()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="fdr")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="fdr")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)

    return(list(
        sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 = sigDiffCor_depth2,
        sigDiffCor_depth2Others = sigDiffCor_depth2H))
}


CORwActiveTaskPerc = getCor(sum_statistic="ActiveTaskPerc") 
cors = CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% 
    dplyr::select(Study, Cancer_type, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn, N_dn) %>%
    arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
    setNames(c("Study", "Cancer_type", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj", "N")) %>%
    mutate(Diff.Sys.="down") %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>%
        dplyr::select(Study, Cancer_type, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up, N_up) %>%
        arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "Cancer_type","cor", "p.value", "p.adj", "N")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
    ) %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>%
        dplyr::select(Study, Cancer_type, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn, N_dn) %>%
        arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "Cancer_type", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj", "N")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="down") %>%
        full_join(
            CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>%
            dplyr::select(Study, Cancer_type, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up, N_up) %>%
            arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
            setNames(c("Study", "Cancer_type", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj", "N")) %>%
            mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
        ) 
    ) %>% mutate(cor=round(cor, 2)) %>% arrange(-cor) %>%
    mutate(Significance = ifelse(p.adj<0.1, "Sig", "nonSig"))

cors_Z = cors %>% filter(Study=="Zhou2020") %>% arrange(-cor) %>%
    mutate(Sig.diff.task=Diff.Sys.)
cors_Z$Cancer_type = factor(cors_Z$Cancer_type, 
    levels=rev(cors_Z$Cancer_type %>% unique()))
cors_Z$Significance = factor(cors_Z$Significance, levels=c("Sig", "nonSig"))
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation/CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr_depth2_Zhou2020.pdf", h=3.5, w=5.5)
ggplot(cors_Z, aes(x=Cancer_type, y=cor)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=Significance, color=Sig.diff.task), size=5) +
    #facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Sig" = 20, "nonSig" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Cor: normal meta. & diff. perc.") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("up"="darkred", "down"="grey")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    # scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) +
    labs(x="", y="Correlation",
         caption=paste0("p.adj Cutoff = 0.1, p.adj Method = fdr"))
dev.off()

cors_H = cors %>% filter(Study=="Others") %>% arrange(-cor) %>%
    mutate(Sig.diff.task=Diff.Sys.)
cors_H$Cancer_type = factor(cors_H$Cancer_type, 
    levels=rev(cors_H$Cancer_type %>% unique()))
cors_H$Significance = factor(cors_H$Significance, levels=c("Sig", "nonSig"))
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation/CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr_depth2_Hu2025.pdf", h=3.5, w=5.5)
ggplot(cors_H, aes(x=Cancer_type, y=cor)) +
    geom_point(aes(shape=Significance, color=Sig.diff.task), size=5) +
    #facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("Sig" = 20, "nonSig" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Cor: normal meta. & diff. perc.") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("up"="darkred", "down"="grey")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    # scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) +
    labs(x="", y="Correlation",
         caption=paste0("p.adj Cutoff = 0.1, p.adj Method = fdr"))
dev.off()

openxlsx::write.xlsx(rbind(cors_Z, cors_H) %>% select(-Diff.Sys.), 
  file=paste0("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation//CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr_depth2_Cancer_type.xlsx"))
  
```


# Correlation between the nr of up/downregulated tasks and the Active task percentage of different subsystems/systems in normal tissues.

```{r}
taskInfo = read.csv2("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/CellFieOut/ESCC/taskInfo.csv", 
                     sep=",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
                     setNames(c("Depth3.ID", "Depth3", "Depth1", "Depth2"))
DEG_files_H = "../results/CellFie_Hu2025/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_H = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_H), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_H, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)

DEG_files_Z = "../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/Limma/TaskDepth3/Limma_differentialAnalysis_result_Depth3.xlsx"
degs_Z = lapply(openxlsx::getSheetNames(DEG_files_Z), function(sheet) {
  openxlsx::read.xlsx(DEG_files_Z, sheet = sheet) %>% 
    mutate(Cancer_type=sheet) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo %>% mutate(Task=Depth3))
}) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)

getCor = function(sum_statistic="ActiveTaskPerc") {
    # Zhou 2020 
    ## Depth2
    tasks = unique(cf5$Depth2)
    sigDiffCor_depth2 = lapply(tasks, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = cf5 %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            left_join(Zhou2020_meta) %>%
            filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Depth2==t) %>%
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))     
        temp = degs_Z[degs_Z$Depth2%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        t = gsub("METABOLISM", "M.", t)
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value)
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$Subsystem = t
            temp$Study="Zhou2020"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
            cor_dn = numeric(),
            p.value_dn = numeric(),
            cor_up = numeric(),
            p.value_up = numeric(),
            Subsystem = character(),
            Study = character()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="BH")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="BH")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)

    ## Depth1
    tasks = unique(cf5$Depth1)
    sigDiffCor_depth1 = lapply(tasks, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = cf5 %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            left_join(Zhou2020_meta) %>%
            filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Depth1==t) %>%
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
        temp = degs_Z[degs_Z$Depth1%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        t = gsub("METABOLISM", "M.", t)
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value)
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$System = t
            temp$Study="Zhou2020"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
            cor_dn = numeric(),
            p.value_dn = numeric(),
            cor_up = numeric(),
            p.value_up = numeric(),
            System = character(),
            Study = character()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="BH")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="BH")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)


    # Hu 2025
    ## Depth2
    tasks = unique(cfs$Depth2)
    sigDiffCor_depth2H = lapply(tasks, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = cfs %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            left_join(Hu2025_meta) %>%
            filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Depth2==t) %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
        temp = degs_H[degs_H$Depth2%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        t = gsub("METABOLISM", "M.", t)
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value)
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$Subsystem = t
            temp$Study="Others"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
            cor_dn = numeric(),
            p.value_dn = numeric(),
            cor_up = numeric(),
            p.value_up = numeric(),
            Subsystem = character(),
            Study = character()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="BH")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="BH")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)

    ## Depth1
    tasks = unique(cfs$Depth1)
    sigDiffCor_depth1H = lapply(tasks, function(t) {
        ActiveTaskSum = cfs %>% mutate(Sample_ID = Sample) %>% dplyr::select(-Sample) %>%
            left_join(Hu2025_meta) %>%
            filter(Sample_type=="Normal") %>%  
            filter(Depth1==t) %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(ActiveTaskNr = sum(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    ActiveTaskPerc = mean(BinaryTaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreSum = sum(TaskScore, na.rm=T),
                    TaskScoreMean = mean(TaskScore, na.rm=T))
        temp = degs_H[degs_H$Depth1%in%t,] %>% 
            group_by(across(all_of(c("Cancer_type")))) %>%
            summarize(SigUpTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC>0),
                      SigDownTaskPerc = mean(adj.P.Val<0.05&logFC<0)) %>%
            left_join(ActiveTaskSum) %>% na.omit()
        t = gsub("METABOLISM", "M.", t)
        if (nrow(temp)>2) {
            temp1 = cor.test(temp$SigDownTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp1 = data.frame(cor_dn=temp1$estimate, p.value_dn=temp1$p.value)
            temp2 = cor.test(temp$SigUpTaskPerc, temp[,sum_statistic,drop=T])
            temp2 = data.frame(cor_up=temp2$estimate, p.value_up=temp2$p.value)
            temp = cbind(temp1, temp2)
            temp$System = t
            temp$Study="Others"
        } else {
            temp = data.frame(
            cor_dn = numeric(),
            p.value_dn = numeric(),
            cor_up = numeric(),
            p.value_up = numeric(),
            System = character(),
            Study = character()
            )
        }
        return(temp)
    }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_up = p.adjust(p.value_up, method="BH")) %>%
        mutate(p.adj_dn = p.adjust(p.value_dn, method="BH")) %>%
        arrange(p.adj_dn)

    return(list(
                sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 = sigDiffCor_depth2,
                sigDiffCor_depth1Zhou2020 = sigDiffCor_depth1,
                sigDiffCor_depth2Others = sigDiffCor_depth2H,
                sigDiffCor_depth1Others = sigDiffCor_depth1H))
}

dir.create("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation", recursive=T, showWarnings=F)
CORwActiveTaskPerc = getCor(sum_statistic="ActiveTaskPerc")

openxlsx::write.xlsx(CORwActiveTaskPerc, 
  file=paste0("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation//CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr.xlsx"))

```

## Depth1_systems

```{r}
taskInfo = read.csv2("../results/CellFie_Hu2025/CellFieOut/ESCC/taskInfo.csv", 
                     sep=",", stringsAsFactors = FALSE) %>%
                     setNames(c("Depth3.ID", "Depth3", "Depth1", "Depth2"))

cors = CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Zhou2020 %>% 
    filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% 
    dplyr::select(Study, System, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn) %>%
    arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
    setNames(c("Study", "System", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
    mutate(Diff.Sys.="down") %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Zhou2020 %>%
        filter(p.adj_up<0.1) %>% 
        dplyr::select(Study, System, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up) %>%
        arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "System","cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
    ) %>%
full_join(
    CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Others %>%
    filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% 
    dplyr::select(Study, System, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn) %>%
    arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
    setNames(c("Study", "System", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
    mutate(Diff.Sys.="down") %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Others %>%
        filter(p.adj_up<0.1) %>% 
        dplyr::select(Study, System, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up) %>%
        arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "System", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
    ) 
) %>% mutate(cor=round(cor, 2)) %>% arrange(-cor) 

cors$System = factor(cors$System, 
    levels=rev(unique(c(cors%>%filter(Diff.Sys.=="down")%>%pull(System),cors$System))))
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation/CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr_depth1.pdf", h=3.5, w=7.5)
ggplot(cors, aes(x=cor, y=System)) +
    geom_point(aes(size=p.adj, shape=Diff.Sys., color=Diff.Sys.)) +
    facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("up" = 20, "down" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Cor: normal meta. activity & diff. nr.") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("up"="grey", "down"="orange")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) +
    labs(y="", x="Correlation",
         caption=paste0("p.value Cutoff = 0.05, p.adj Method = BH"))
dev.off()

cors

```

## Depth2
```{r}
cors = CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>%
    mutate(Study="Zhou2020") %>% 
    filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% 
    dplyr::select(Study, Subsystem, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn) %>%
    arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
    setNames(c("Study", "Subsystem", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
    mutate(Diff.Sys.="down")  %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>%
        mutate(Study="Zhou2020") %>% 
        filter(p.adj_up<0.05) %>% 
        dplyr::select(Study, Subsystem, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up) %>%
        arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "Subsystem", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
    ) %>%
full_join(
    CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>%
    mutate(Study="Others") %>% 
    filter(p.value_dn<0.1) %>% 
    dplyr::select(Study, Subsystem, cor_dn, p.value_dn, p.adj_dn) %>%
    arrange(-cor_dn) %>% 
    setNames(c("Study", "Subsystem", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
    mutate(Diff.Sys.="down") %>%
    full_join(
        CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>%
        mutate(Study="Others") %>% 
        filter(p.adj_up<0.1) %>% 
        dplyr::select(Study, Subsystem, cor_up, p.value_up, p.adj_up) %>%
        arrange(-cor_up) %>% 
        setNames(c("Study", "Subsystem", "cor", "p.value", "p.adj")) %>%
        mutate(Diff.Sys.="up") 
    ) 
) %>% mutate(cor=round(cor, 2)) %>% arrange(-cor) %>%
    left_join(taskInfo%>%mutate(Subsystem=gsub("METABOLISM","M.",Depth2))) %>%
    mutate(System=gsub(" METABOLISM","",Depth1)) %>%
    mutate(Depth1=stringr::str_sub(Depth1, 1, 3)) 

cors$Subsystem = factor(cors$Subsystem, 
    levels=rev(unique(c(cors%>%filter(Diff.Sys.=="down")%>%pull(Subsystem),cors$Subsystem))))
pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation/CorrelationBetweenNormalTissueActiveTaskPercentageAndDifferentialTaskNr_depth2.pdf", 
    h=12, w=8)
ggplot(cors, aes(x=cor, y=Subsystem)) +
    geom_point(aes(size=p.adj, shape=Diff.Sys., color=Diff.Sys.)) +
    # facet_wrap(~Study, ncol=2) + 
    facet_nested(Depth1~Study, scales = "free_y", space = "free") +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("up" = 20, "down" = 18)) +
    ggtitle("Cor: normal meta. activity & diff. nr.") +
    scale_color_manual(values=c("up"="grey", "down"="orange")) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) + 
    scale_size(trans="reverse") +
    guides(alpha="none", size=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21))) +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        strip.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=0.5, vjust=0.5)) +
    labs(y="", x="Correlation",
         caption=paste0("p.value Cutoff = 0.05, p.adj Method = BH"))
dev.off()

pdf("../doc/FiguresTables/correlation/boxplots.pdf", w=4, h=3.8)
temp = cors[cors$Study=="Others",] %>% arrange(Depth1)
temp$Depth1 = factor(temp$Depth1, levels=unique(temp$Depth1))
ggplot(temp, aes(fill=Diff.Sys., y=cor, x=System)) + 
    # geom_bar(position="dodge", stat="identity") +
    geom_boxplot(width=0.5,position = position_dodge(width=0.7)) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 15) +
    ylab("Correlation") +
    xlab("System") +
    labs(fill="Regulation") +
    theme(
        # axis.title = element_blank(),
        # strip.text.y = element_text(size = 10, angle = 90, hjust=0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust=1, vjust=0)) 
    # geom_bar(position="dodge", stat="identity")
dev.off()

```

## summary

### Depth2
```{r}
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% min()
# [1] 0.6231626
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% max()
# [1] 0.8763726
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()
# [1] 0.7495821
```

```{r}
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% min()
# [1] -0.8615612
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% max()
# [1] -0.622255
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()
# [1] -0.7343217
```

```{r}
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% min()
# [1] 0.5996359
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% max()
# [1] 0.9202862
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()
# [1] 0.7718389
```

```{r}
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% min()
# [1] -0.9141435
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% max()
# [1] -0.5906396
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth2Others %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()
# [1] -0.7399185
```

CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% max()

CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Zhou2020 %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% max()

# [1] 0.8759472
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Others %>% filter(p.value_dn<0.05) %>% pull(cor_dn) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()

```

# [1]  -0.8032965
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Others %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% max()
# [1] -0.6233187
CORwActiveTaskPerc$sigDiffCor_depth1Others %>% filter(p.value_up<0.05) %>% pull(cor_up) %>% na.omit() %>% mean()
# [1] -0.747471
```

# Limma table

```{r}
library(dplyr)
limma_results = list.files(path="../results/CellFie_Zhou2020/Limma/", pattern="\\.xlsx$", 
                           full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
Zhou2020 = lapply(limma_results, function(file) {
  sheets = readxl::excel_sheets(file)
  all_sheets = lapply(sheets, function(sheet) {
    c = readxl::read_excel(file, sheet = sheet)
    c$Cancer_type = sheet
    c
  }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)
})


limma_results2 = list.files(path="../results/CellFie_Hu2025/Limma/", pattern="\\.xlsx$", 
                           full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
Hu2025 = lapply(limma_results2, function(file) {
  sheets = readxl::excel_sheets(file)
  all_sheets = lapply(sheets, function(sheet) {
    c = readxl::read_excel(file, sheet = sheet)
    c$Cancer_type = sheet
    c
  }) %>% Reduce(rbind, .)
})

openxlsx::write.xlsx(c(setNames(Zhou2020, paste0("Zhou2020_Depth", 1:3)), 
                       setNames(Hu2025, paste0("Others_Depth", 1:3))),
  file=paste0("../doc/FiguresTables/LimmaResults.xlsx"))

```




```{r}
output = capture.output(sessionInfo())
writeLines(output, "../doc/FiguresTables/sessionInfo.txt")
sessionInfo()
```
